leadText: Barb Barrage (Japanese: どくばりセンボン Thousand Stingers) is a damage-dealing Poison-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is the signature move of Qwilfish, Hisuian Qwilfish, and Overqwil.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.2 Generation IX 1.3 Other effects Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Barb Barrage deals damage and has a 30% chance to poison the target. Its power is doubled if the target is affected by a non-volatile status condition . Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Physical PP 15 Agile Strong Power 60 45 75 Accuracy 100% 100% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Chance 30% 30% 50% Turns 3 2 4 ? ? May inflict the target with poison Power is doubled if the target has a status condition Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Barb Barrage's PP was decreased to 10. It has a 50% chance of poisoning the target, and its power is doubled if the target is already poisoned. Other effects [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , a Hisuian Qwilfish that has used Barb Barrage in the strong style at least 20 times can evolve into Overqwil . In Pokémon Scarlet and Violet , a Hisuian Qwilfish will evolve into Overqwil simply by leveling up while knowing this move. In Pokémon Legends: Z-A , a Hisuan Qwilfish will evolve into Overqwil by having Barb Barrage hit 20 targets.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA The user launches countless toxic barbs to inflict damage. This may also poison the target. This move’s power is doubled if the target has a status condition. S V The user launches countless toxic barbs to inflict damage. This may also poison the target. This move’s power is doubled if the target is already poisoned. ZA The user attacks by launching countless toxic barbs, which may also poison targets. This move's power is doubled if a target is already poisoned.
